name: au7h
description: Dev tooling for the PHP-based Au7h secure auth app.

scripts.dev: bun run dev:up && bun run dev:watch
scripts.dev:watch: concurrently -n css,app -c cyan,yellow "bun run dev:css" "bun run dev:logs"
scripts.snort:logs: docker compose -f compose.dev.yaml exec snort sh -lc 'touch /var/log/snort/alert_fast.txt && tail -f /var/log/snort/alert_fast.txt'
scripts.snort:test-rules: docker run --rm --entrypoint /home/snorty/snort3/bin/snort -v "$PWD/security/snort/snort.lua:/home/snorty/snort3/etc/snort/au7h.lua:ro" -v "$PWD/security/snort/rules:/home/snorty/snort3/etc/rules/au7h:ro" ciscotalos/snort3:latest -i eth0 -i lo -k none -c /home/snorty/snort3/etc/snort/au7h.lua -T
scripts.acl:status: docker compose -f compose.dev.yaml exec app sh -lc 'iptables -S INPUT && iptables -L AU7H_INPUT -n -v'

author: Codex
